original_text: CEO Brian Chesky announced strategic shifts during the earnings call, stating the company will pursue hotels 'significantly more aggressively' going forward C008. This hotel expansion initiative contributed to the post-earnings share decline of roughly 6% C008. Separately, Chesky outlined an AI-first strategy for travel planning, noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' as Airbnb expands its customer service agent capabilities C010. R&D intensity remained elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, reflecting continued investment in technology infrastructure K005.
revised_text: CEO Brian Chesky announced strategic shifts during the earnings call, stating the company will pursue hotels 'significantly more aggressively' going forward C008. The announcement coincided with a post-earnings share decline of roughly 6% C008. Separately, Chesky outlined an AI-first strategy for travel planning, noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' as Airbnb expands its customer service agent capabilities C010. R&D intensity remained elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, reflecting continued investment in technology infrastructure K005.
changes_summary: Rephrased the share decline claim to reflect correlation ('coincided with') rather than causation ('contributed to') to address Issue 3. Retained citation IDs C008 and C010 instead of the suggested C081 and C083 (Issues 1 & 2) because C081 and C083 were not present in the available evidence chunks, while C008 and C010 contain the supporting text.
